scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green -k --kill-others-on-fail "PORT=${API_PORT:-4000} pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run dev" "PORT=${WEB_PORT:-5173} pnpm --filter @workspace/opengrid-canvas run dev"
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.build:web: pnpm --filter @workspace/api-spec run codegen && pnpm --filter @workspace/opengrid-canvas run build && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server run build
scripts.docker:run: docker run --rm -p 8080:8080 -e SESSION_SECRET=$(openssl rand -hex 32) -e ALLOWED_ORIGINS=http://localhost:8080 opengrid:local
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./artifacts/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
